description: Rollback archive location registry. Each entry defines a local or remote archive target with per-location encryption keys and access tiers.

locations.label: Local Test Archive
locations.description: Default local archive target for testing rollback functionality.
locations.notes: Default test location. Replace path and vault entries before production use.

locations.label: Local Workspace Archive
locations.description: Primary local rollback archive alongside the workspace.
locations.notes: Enable and set vault entries before first use.

locations.label: Remote Network Share
locations.description: UNC path remote archive for off-machine disaster recovery.
locations.notes: Remote UNC share. Requires network access and drive mapping. Disable if not connected.
